offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate bill collection and summarization instead of manual spreadsheets and email tracking.
problem: manual tracking and summarizing of utility bills
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try summary generation and dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
